description: News-headline collage graphic arranged as a 2x2 grid with red, white, and blue framing and a navy footer bar bearing the white DHS seal. Each quadrant pairs a news outlet's logo with one of its headlines over a faded background photo: top-left, 'Washington Examiner' over 'Noem sends warning to illegal immigrants from El Salvador prison with Tren de Aragua members'; top-right, 'FOX NEWS' over 'ICE in Boston nabs previously deported Dominican fentanyl trafficker, child rape convict, murderers'; bottom-left, 'Just the News.' over 'DHS Secretary Noem says ‘gravy train’ over at HUD for illegal immigrants' (with a faded photo of Noem in a CBP cap and police vest); bottom-right, the 'AP' logo over 'US Homeland Security secretary agrees data-sharing program with Colombia during Bogota visit.' The tweet caption reads 'America First.'
notable_text: Washington Examiner - Noem sends warning to illegal immigrants from El Salvador prison with Tren de Aragua members; FOX NEWS - ICE in Boston nabs previously deported Dominican fentanyl trafficker, child rape convict, murderers; Just the News - DHS Secretary Noem says 'gravy train' over at HUD for illegal immigrants; AP - US Homeland Security secretary agrees data-sharing program with Colombia during Bogota visit
